titleStmt.title: SII 11.187: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 187. (B.K. No. 32 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR IN THE MAṆḌAPA OF THE SŌMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 28, Subhānu, Māgha, ba. 8, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1104, January 21, Thursday; f.d.t. ·71. It registers a gift of cloth made by Saṅkimayya-Nāyaka and Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 28 neya subhānu
saṁvatsarada māgha bahuḷa Aṣṭami bṛhaspativāradaṁ
du . saṁkimayyanāyakaruṁ mahadēvabhaṭṭaruṁ tamma Aka
sāladalu tamage dīpāvaḷiya parvvada luḍalu kuḍuva
vahamānamaṁ savakaṭṭuva pannirvvarige biṭṭa ravara putra
mitrakaḷatrādigaḷellaṁ badde puṇya nāyakargge bhaṭṭargge .
Idaṁ kādu naḍedavargge vāraṇāsiyalu sāyira ka
vilevaṁ sāsirvvar vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁ
goṭṭa phala makku . Idanaḷidavaṁ vāraṇāsiyalu sāsi
ra kavilevaṁ sāyira brāhmaṇaruma naḷida mahāpā
taka . Intappuda naṟidorvvarirvva remage svāmi saṁpattuṁ
daleyeṁdu mēle Akkasālaṁ goṁḍavara kiviyaṁ pacci
davaṁge cakravarttiyāṇe sāsirvvarāṇe . Ī yāṇe
yaṁ miridevanaṁ keḍahi kolvudu Avaṁ sattaḍe ha
ndi sattudu nāyi sattudu . © maṁgaḷamahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
